base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of weapons_projectiles — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1987 mega man. Player weapons — Mega Buster (charged + regular) + Rolling Cutter spin + Thunder Beam 3-way + Ice Slasher + Fire Storm + Hyper Bomb arc + Super Arm block-throw. 680×318 canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Player weapons — Mega Buster (charged + regular) + Rolling Cutter spin + Thunder Beam 3-way + Ice Slasher + Fire Storm + Hyper Bomb arc + Super Arm block-throw. 680×318 canvas
